tasks.label: YAML: Lint Project
tasks.command: mkdir -p .reports && git ls-files -z --cached --others --exclude-standard '*.yml' '*.yaml' | xargs -0 -r yamllint -c .validate/.yamllint | tee .reports/yaml_lint.txt

tasks.label: JSON: Verify All Files
tasks.command: mkdir -p .reports && git ls-files -z --cached --others --exclude-standard '*.json' | xargs -0 -r check-jsonschema --schemafile https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema | tee .reports/json_validation.txt

tasks.label: HA: Verify Manifest
tasks.command: mkdir -p .reports && git ls-files -z --cached --others --exclude-standard 'manifest.json' '**/manifest.json' | xargs -0 -r check-jsonschema --schemafile .validate/ha_manifest_schema.json | tee .reports/ha_manifest_validation.txt

tasks.label: Markdown: Lint (View Only)
tasks.command: mkdir -p .reports && git ls-files -z --cached --others --exclude-standard '*.md' | xargs -0 -r markdownlint --config .validate/.markdownlint.json | tee .reports/markdown_lint.txt

tasks.label: Prettier: Check (View Only)
tasks.command: mkdir -p .reports && git ls-files -z --cached --others --exclude-standard '*.md' '*.json' '*.yaml' '*.yml' | xargs -0 -r prettier --config .validate/.prettierrc --check | tee .reports/prettier_check.txt

tasks.label: HA: Verify Version (AwesomeVersion)
tasks.command: mkdir -p .reports && uv run --with awesomeversion python3 -c "import json; from awesomeversion import AwesomeVersion; v = json.load(open('custom_components/wifi_ssid_monitor/manifest.json'))['version']; av = AwesomeVersion(v); print(f'Version {v} detected strategy: {av.strategy}'); exit(1 if av.strategy == 'unknown' else 0)" | tee .reports/version_validation.txt

tasks.label: Validate All
tasks.command: mkdir -p .reports && (uv run --with awesomeversion python3 -c "import json; from awesomeversion import AwesomeVersion; v = json.load(open('custom_components/wifi_ssid_monitor/manifest.json'))['version']; av = AwesomeVersion(v); print(f'Version {v} detected strategy: {av.strategy}'); exit(1 if av.strategy == 'unknown' else 0)" | tee .reports/version_validation.txt) && (git ls-files -z --cached --others --exclude-standard '*.yml' '*.yaml' | xargs -0 -r yamllint -c .validate/.yamllint | tee .reports/yaml_lint.txt) && (git ls-files -z --cached --others --exclude-standard '*.json' | xargs -0 -r check-jsonschema --schemafile https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema | tee .reports/json_validation.txt) && (git ls-files -z --cached --others --exclude-standard 'manifest.json' '**/manifest.json' | xargs -0 -r check-jsonschema --schemafile .validate/ha_manifest_schema.json | tee .reports/ha_manifest_validation.txt) && (check-jsonschema --schemafile .validate/hacs_schema.json hacs.json | tee .reports/hacs_validation.txt) && (hass --script check_config --config /config | tee .reports/ha_check_config.txt) && (ruff check . | tee .reports/ruff_lint.txt) && (ruff format --check . | tee .reports/ruff_format_status.txt) && (markdown-link-check README.md | tee .reports/markdown_link_check.txt) && (git ls-files -z --cached --others --exclude-standard '*.md' | xargs -0 -r markdownlint --config .validate/.markdownlint.json | tee .reports/markdown_lint.txt) && (git ls-files -z --cached --others --exclude-standard '*.md' '*.json' '*.yaml' '*.yml' | xargs -0 -r prettier --config .validate/.prettierrc --check | tee .reports/prettier_check.txt) && (PYTHONPATH=. pytest --cov=custom_components/wifi_ssid_monitor/ --cov-report=xml:.reports/coverage.xml --junitxml=.reports/pytest_results.xml tests/ -W ignore::DeprecationWarning) && (PYTHONPATH=. pytest --cov=custom_components/wifi_ssid_monitor/ --cov-report=term-missing --cov-report=html:.reports/coverage tests/)

tasks.label: Fix All
tasks.command: (git ls-files -z --cached --others --exclude-standard '*.md' | xargs -0 -r markdownlint --config .validate/.markdownlint.json --fix) && ruff format . && ruff check --fix . && (git ls-files -z --cached --others --exclude-standard '*.md' '*.json' '*.yaml' '*.yml' | xargs -0 -r prettier --config .validate/.prettierrc --write)
